calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: MECH-112/117 Wanting vs Liking Dissociation -- z_goal_latent vs benefit_eval_head
items.notes: Fix: progressive fixes through 074-074d (env kwargs, agent init, combined backward). Different design from EXQ-189 (wanting/liking dissociation with resource relocation).

items.title: MECH-116/ARC-032 E1 LSTM Goal Conditioning -- frontal working memory persistence
items.notes: Fix: progressive fixes through 076-076c (combined e1+e2 backward, dimension corrections). 10000 total steps (up from 076d's 2000) for meaningful halflife measurement.

items.title: SD-003 Full Latent Counterfactual Attribution on z_harm_s (post-SD-011)
items.notes: Full latent z_harm_s counterfactual pipeline. Uses ResidualHarmForward (now in ree_core) to avoid identity collapse. Transposition of EXQ-030b (z_world) to z_harm_s. EXQ-166e validated scalar proxy; this validates the full latent version.

items.title: ARC-039 entorhinal consolidation probe (with_consolidation vs no_consolidation)
items.note: ARC-039 targeted probe: WITH_CONSOLIDATION (residue.integrate() every 20 eps) vs NO_CONSOLIDATION. V3 proxy for hippocampal-entorhinal offline consolidation principle. diagnostic purpose. 3 seeds x 2 conditions.

items.title: Q-002 residue field resolution pair (high_res=64 vs low_res=8 RBF centers)
items.note: Q-002 discriminative pair: HIGH_RES (64 RBF centers) vs LOW_RES (8 RBF centers). Uses real ResidueField from ree_core. Supersedes EXQ-170 (inline arch). 3 seeds.

items.title: MECH-033 E2 kernel chain pair (chain vs no-chain, 3-seed replication)
items.note: MECH-033 3-seed replication (extends EXQ-171 2-seed). KERNEL_CHAIN vs NO_CHAIN greedy avoidance. 600 warmup + 50 eval eps per seed.

items.title: ARC-018 rollout viability pair (viability_mapped vs viability_ablated)
items.note: ARC-018 discriminative pair: VIABILITY_MAPPED (ResidueField + HippocampalModule CEM terrain) vs VIABILITY_ABLATED (residue field zeroed). Real ree_core modules. Fixes EXQ-172 inline-module issue. 3 seeds.

items.title: ARC-029 committed vs ablated mode harm pair (stable + volatile envs)
items.note: ARC-029 matched-seed discriminative pair. Extends EXQ-063 (PASS) with explicit pre-registered thresholds + 2 matched seeds. 2x2 gate x environment (stable/volatile). 400 warmup + 50 eval x 200 steps.
